Transformers One (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,098,421Details
International Box Office $69,219,245
Worldwide Box Office $128,317,666
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but once were friends bonded like brothers who changed the fate of Cybertron forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,613,970 (41.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,978 opening theaters/3,978 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $62,494,887

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 20th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: September 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
September 12th, 2024 (Wide), released as Transformers Uno (Chile)
September 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Panama)
September 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Venezuela)
September 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: October 22nd, 2024 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for sci-fi violence and animated action throughout, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2847 (cert #54827), 8/14/2024)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Plot point: Friends turned Enemies, Origin Story, Robot
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
